textPlain: I met a girl I liked and when I went to her apartment I saw she had a tetrapod wine stopper. That's when I knew the relationship was going to work out.

There's sewing patterns for making your own plush tetrapods if you want to make your living room look like a Japanese beach:https://soranews24.com/2014/10/24/kawaii-concrete-japanese-r...https://www.persistentrealities.com/site/page/tetrapod
